description: 100 mixed context stress groups. Groups 1-20 are single-topic; 21-59 bridge adjacent themes; 60-80 insert more than three related themes; 81-100 hard-insert distant themes. Every turn after the first is asserted against the hidden rolling twelve-turn reasoning window; the UI-visible window remains four turns.
